scripts.dev: concurrently "bun run --cwd server dev" "bun run --cwd client dev"
scripts.dev:host: concurrently "bun run --cwd server dev" "bun run --cwd client dev -- --host"
scripts.install:all: bun install && bun install --cwd server && bun install --cwd client
scripts.package: npm run build:client && npm run package:server && npm run package:client && npm run package:updater && node scripts/postpackage.js
scripts.release: npm run package && gh release create v%npm_package_version% dist/badshuffle-server.exe dist/badshuffle-client.exe dist/badshuffle-updater.exe dist/www.zip dist/badshuffle-extension.zip --title v%npm_package_version% --notes ""
